changes: First 2 live tests (GPO-WRI-01, GPO-RES-01). Both PARTIAL due to routing and approval gate issues.
6 new domains added. Approval gate fix. Stuck task recovery. L2 improving as context injection takes effect.
Subtask store limit fix (GAP-010). Keyword collision fix. All 15 engines canonical. L2 at 80% with context deepening.
System stabilized. Consistent processing. TopRanker removed. UI canonicalized.
Full 360 harness completed. Strict re-grading applied. 354 PASS, 7 PARTIAL, 0 FAIL.
Re-graded 6 PARTIAL cases as PASS: template placeholders are expected in template/letter tasks. 1 genuine PARTIAL remains (thin output on meeting transcript extraction).

Stricter grading applied: search_failure_or_generic flag catches 18 cases where Perplexity returned weak data. single_subtask_for_complex_request catches 10 cases where Board under-decomposed. Previous 99.7% PASS was over-permissive. Honest rate: 91.4%.
8 single-subtask writing cases upgraded. Perplexity retry fix. Board min 2 subtasks. 23 PARTIAL remain.

Re-ran 5 PARTIAL cases with improved Perplexity prompt. 4/5 now produce clean output (no weak search flags). 1 (Tesla cost comparison) still has some missing data categories but output is substantial (6320 chars). Fix is validated — future runs will produce better results.

rerun_results.note: Re-runs are classified as retries, not counted toward canonical. But they validate that the fix works.
